name: Giant Potato Pancake
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes using a vegetable peeler.
2. Grate the potatoes on a medium grater and add them to a large bowl.
3. Add chopped onion, salt, and pepper to the grated potatoes. Mix thoroughly with a blending fork.
4. Melt margarine in a 10-inch frying pan until it coats the bottom and sides of the pan.
5. Transfer the potato mixture into the hot pan and press down evenly.
6. Cover the pan tightly and place it on low heat for about 15 minutes, or until the underside is browned.
7. Carefully turn the pancake onto a plate using one hand to hold the frying pan handle and the other to guide the plate.
8. Immediately return the pancake to the hot frying pan with the browned side up. Do not cover the pan.
9. Cook for another 15 minutes on low heat until the bottom is thoroughly browned.
10. Serve the pancake cut into 6 pie-shaped wedges.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 STARCH EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CHO: 16g; PRO: 2g; FAT: 6g; CAL: 124;
Low-sodium diets: Omit salt. Use unsalted margarine.
